Availability.description: Availability classification; controls whether the event occupies time.

CancelEvent.description: The event to cancel, with already-resolved [start, end) instants.

EventStatus.description: Event status. A cancelled event is a tombstone that occupies no time.

Instant.description: A UTC instant; the only instant representation.

PolicyProfile.description: Named, versioned policy profile supplying scheduling defaults.

Span.description: Scope of a series edit: a single occurrence, this occurrence and all following, or the whole series.

description: Emit a CANCEL plan (never a write). By default the event is returned as a cancelled tombstone and kept in the set; with span=thisEvent and an occurrenceStart, the plan instead records an EXDATE for that single occurrence.

occurrenceStart.description: With span=thisEvent, the occurrence start to exclude (records an EXDATE).

title: cancel_event_plan request
